stemHtml:
Which of the following effects are associated with subsidence?

1. An increase in vertical instability
2. An increase in vertical stability
3. An increase in relative humidity up to the saturation point, followed by the formation of cumuliform clouds
4. A frequent occurrence of an inversion at of 2000 ft – 6000 ft/GND
5. A decrease in relative humidity, often resulting in the dissipation of clouds
6. A frequent occurrence of an inversion between the ground and approximately 1000 ft/GND
